pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent to version 4.0.1 to align with Java 21 support.
Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Bump the Maven wrapper version property to 3.3.4.
Bump the JaCoCo version property to 0.8.14.
Introduce a new property for the SonarQube scanner version.
Remove the default activation of the coverage profile to prevent automatic execution.
Explicitly configure JaCoCo to generate XML format reports.

.github/workflows/analysis.yml.general_idea: Restrict pull_request trigger to specific event types to reduce unnecessary workflow runs.
.github/workflows/analysis.yml.human_impl: branches: [main, beta, alpha] -> types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

.github/workflows/analysis.yml.general_idea: Update the CI environment to use Java 21 instead of Java 17.
Inject GITHUB_TOKEN into the Sonar step to enable GitHub integration features.
Use explicit plugin execution syntax for Sonar to ensure correct behavior in CI.
.github/workflows/analysis.yml.human_impl: mvn clean verify sonar:sonar -> mvn -B clean verify org.sonarsource.scanner.maven:sonar-maven-plugin:sonar

.github/workflows/analysis.yml.general_idea: Activate the coverage Maven profile during the Sonar analysis step.

.github/workflows/release.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 for the release job.
Remove the npm cache configuration from the setup-node step in the release workflow.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper version to 3.3.4 to align with newer build tooling standards.
Update the Maven distribution URL to point to version 3.9.12.
Configure the wrapper to download only the script distribution type.

.releaserc.general_idea: Corrected invalid JSON syntax by changing string 'true' to boolean true for the prerelease property.

mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script from version 3.2.0 to 3.3.2 to align with the project's dependency updates.
mvnw.human_impl: Updated version comment and applied script changes from maven-wrapper v3.3.2.

mvnw.general_idea: Fix shell script syntax and compatibility issues in the Maven Wrapper to ensure it runs correctly on various Unix-like environments.
mvnw.human_impl: Reformatted case statements, fixed spacing in test brackets, and updated hash_string logic for POSIX compliance.

mvnw.general_idea: Resolve issues with whitespace handling in property values read from maven-wrapper.properties.
mvnw.human_impl: Added a trim() function and applied it to distributionUrl and distributionSha256Sum values.

mvnw.general_idea: Allow customization of the Maven user home directory via the MAVEN_USER_HOME environment variable.
mvnw.human_impl: Introduced MAVEN_USER_HOME variable defaulting to ~/.m2 and used it to construct MAVEN_HOME.

mvnw.general_idea: Improve error handling for download and extraction steps in the Maven Wrapper.
mvnw.human_impl: Added || die clauses to wget, curl, javac, unzip, and tar commands to fail explicitly on errors.

mvnw.general_idea: Update the embedded Java downloader to use URI.create instead of URL constructor for better security and compliance.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed java.net.URL(args[0]) to java.net.URI.create(args[0]).toURL() in Downloader.java.

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script from version 3.2.0 to 3.3.2 to align with the project's dependency updates.
Add support for the MAVEN_USER_HOME environment variable to allow customizing the Maven distribution cache directory.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Added check for $env:MAVEN_USER_HOME to override $MAVEN_HOME_PARENT path

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Explicitly import the Microsoft.PowerShell.Utility module to ensure Get-FileHash is available, addressing potential module loading issues in newer PowerShell environments.

renovate.json.general_idea: Add dependency dashboard to visualize and manage pending updates.
Configure Renovate to use semantic commit messages for PRs.
Remove hourly limits and increase concurrent PR limits for faster updates.
Pin GitHub Actions to specific digests for security and reproducibility.
Define timezone for schedule calculations.
Restrict dependency updates to weekday business hours.
Automatically label dependency PRs for easier filtering.
Enable automatic merging of PRs on the platform level.
Configure squash merging for automated merges.
Rebase PRs when they fall behind the base branch.
Customize the title of the dependency dashboard.
Automatically merge patch and minor updates for Maven dependencies.
Automatically merge patch and minor updates for GitHub Actions.
Prevent automatic merging of major version updates.
Group Spring Boot related dependencies into a single PR.
Group testing framework dependencies into a single PR.
Explicitly enable the Maven manager in Renovate.
Explicitly enable the GitHub Actions manager in Renovate.
Ignore the target directory to avoid scanning build artifacts.
Create PRs only when not pending other checks.
Require successful build status check before merging.
